note: bot_core.py only. Defensive slug-date check in the local origination path. No changes to model_bridge.py (already has date gate), paper_exec.py, or risk.py.

context.incident: Trade ID 200 (mlb-cws-kc-2026-04-11, BUY_YES) was opened on Apr 9 for a game 2 days out. Source='bot' — opened via local origination, which has no slug-date filter. Model bridge already rejects future-dated slugs (model_bridge.py line 127: slug_date != today → reject), but local origination bypasses this entirely.
context.root_cause: ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION was enabled in the Apr-6 process. The local origination code path (bot_core.py ~line 344) has no date check — it will bet on any slug in the discovery cache including games days away.
context.current_state: All stale processes killed. Fresh processes started via launch_all.py. ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION defaults to 0 (not in .env), so local origination is currently disabled. This task adds defensive date gating so the bug cannot recur even if local origination is re-enabled.

implementation.where: In the local origination path, immediately after the ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION guard (line ~351, after the continue statement). Before the call to generate_signal().
implementation.add_import_if_missing: from datetime import date as _date  (check if 'date' is already imported from datetime — it may already be present as 'from datetime import datetime, timezone')
code_to_insert: # Date gate: only bet on today's games (same check as model_bridge.py line 127)
logger.debug('LOCAL DATE GATE REJECT slug=%s slug_date=%s today=%s', market.slug, _slug_date, _date.today())
implementation.note: Mirror of the check in model_bridge.py _extract_slug_date() / line 127. If slug date can't be parsed, also reject (None != date.today()). This runs after the ALLOW_LOCAL_MLB_ORIGINATION continue so it adds zero overhead when local origination is disabled.

steps: Confirm no new trade opens for a slug dated tomorrow or later (check DB after next bot loop)
Confirm today's game slugs still pass (manual check: _date.fromisoformat('-'.join('mlb-cws-kc-2026-04-10'.split('-')[-3:])) == date.today())

do_not: Edit any file other than bot_core.py
